assumption_to_test: A compact command registry plus taxonomy is enough for AI and human operators to choose major commands without rereading the full CLI reference.
smallest_testable_validation: Create a first command-registry artifact for the current CLI surface and verify that key operator paths can be selected from the registry plus recognition packet alone.
expected_learning: Whether the problem is truly context routing, which taxonomy fields are required, and whether registry-driven discovery reduces ambiguity across read/verify/write/execute/observe paths.
expected_cost: Moderate implementation cost because the CLI surface already exists and only metadata plus packet integration need to be added.
success_threshold: Registry-driven discovery must cover the major operator paths and remain aligned with the current CLI without semantic regressions.
